title: Literature Digest Formatting Guidelines
body:
Formatting guidelines for literature digests posted to eng-digests:
- Use bullet points for key findings and techniques.
- Word limit: 500-800 words.
- Section suggestions: Abstract, Key Techniques, Challenges, Notable Papers, Outlook.
- Include citations in the form [Author et al., Year] as hyperlinks when possible.
- Keep language concise and technical, avoid marketing fluff.
